faq.question: Who is Likith Naidu Anumakonda?
faq.answer: Likith Naidu Anumakonda is an AI/ML Engineer, Founder of SAKRA VISION, Author, and Classical Pianist based in Andhra Pradesh, India. He specializes in offline LLM architectures, RAG systems, and autonomous automation.

faq.question: What is Resolvit AI?
faq.answer: Resolvit AI is a flagship project by Likith—an AI-powered civic issue tracking platform that uses FastAPI and PostgreSQL to streamline community problem-solving.

faq.question: How can I contact Likith?
faq.answer: You can reach Likith via email at likith.anumakonda@gmail.com or through the Collaborate page on his portfolio website.

faq.question: What are Likith's technical skills?
faq.answer: His technical stack includes Python (FastAPI), Java SE, Next.js, React, Node.js, and specialized AI/ML tools like Llama 3.2, Apple MLX, and RAG architectures.

faq.question: Is Likith open to collaboration?
faq.answer: Yes, Likith is open to technical collaborations, especially in AI agent development, freelance projects, and startup partnerships.
